svg.title: Full project architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: React frontend, Node.js API, and Supabase PostgreSQL database, with SerpAPI as an external service.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What pages does the React frontend have?')
sendPrompt('What routes does the Node.js API have?')
sendPrompt('What tables does the Supabase database have?')
sendPrompt('When does the app call SerpAPI?')

g.text: same user + same query = DB hit
